item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "phrase='legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
for f in longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json longhorizon-work/scenario-06/docs/migration.md; do
  printf 'FILE=%s\\n' \""'$f"
  rg -n -F -- "$phrase" "$f"
  match_count=$(rg -o -F -- "$phrase" "$f" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
  printf 'EXACT_MATCH_COUNT=%s\\n' \""'$match_count"
done'
